name: The Mommy Club: Van die Hoofstad
original_name: The Mommy Club: Van die Hoofstad
overview: The third installment of the franchise will showcase five powerhouse moms who are redefining the art of balancing parenting, power and prestige - all while leaning on their close-knit families to raise the next generation.
